steps.t: Khôltekh has asked you to go to Deshûkh, the Blood Market, to rescue a group of kidnapped Umbari nobles. First you must go see the Guard Captain Nûru …
Nuru has told you that the Blood Market is located south-west of here, in Dil-irmíz, the Berths.
Return to Khôltekh in Dâr Laja, the Hall of the Kindred.
